text:
Machine Learning: A Comprehensive Guide

Machine Learning is a branch of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn from data and improve over time. Supervised learning uses labeled training data to predict outcomes. Unsupervised learning finds hidden patterns in unlabeled data. Reinforcement learning learns through trial and error with rewards. Neural networks are computing systems inspired by biological networks. Deep learning uses neural networks with many layers. Gradient descent is an optimization algorithm for minimizing loss. Applications include image recognition and autonomous vehicles.
